creator: candy-sendpr@kgc.co.jp
text:
FreeBSD 8.0 (and earlier) if_rue.c doesn't detect OQO model01 (NOT model01+) network controller.

Fix: 

apply the patch.

dmesg:
rue0: <vendor 0x1557 product 0x8150, class 0/0, rev 1.10/1.00, addr 2> on usbus1
miibus0: <MII bus> on rue0
ruephy0: <RealTek RTL8150 internal media interface> PHY 0 on miibus0
ruephy0:  10baseT, 10baseT-FDX, 100baseTX, 100baseTX-FDX, auto
ue0: <USB Ethernet> on rue0
